mentions.note: Trading at 12x earnings with resurrection narrative intact; beaten-down name poised for multiple expansion as M&A cycle accelerates. Finished up 4% today; deep value.
Financial sector outperforming on regulatory relief and capital markets activity; still room for multiple expansion.
Transformed from ugly duckling to beautiful swan; analysts behind the curve on new numbers; keeps surprising upside with estimate revisions; stock flies on beats.
8% revenue, 35% EPS growth, 14% NII best-in-class; transformation 80% complete. Much cheaper than peers even after 66% YTD rally; professional quarter. Cramer's first choice to buy of the four banks.
Most likely to jump higher next week; consistently beats estimates and loved on Wall Street; reports Tuesday.
CEO Jane Frasier exemplifies great management; cut costs, rationalized bank, made Citi perennial litter pick. Made new intraday high despite market weakness.
